# Vendor JavaScript Libraries

This directory contains third-party JavaScript libraries used in the frontend.

## Libraries

### Alpine.js
- **Version**: 3.x (minified)
- **License**: MIT
- **Source**: https://alpinejs.dev/
- **Size**: 44 KB

### Tom Select
- **Version**: Latest (minified)
- **License**: MIT
- **Source**: https://tom-select.js.org/
- **Size**: 50 KB

### Flatpickr
- **Version**: 4.6.13 (minified)
- **License**: MIT
- **Source**: https://flatpickr.js.org/
- **Size**: 49 KB

## License Compliance

All libraries are licensed under the MIT License. Their use in this project (which is licensed under the ISC License) is fully compliant with both license terms.

### MIT License Summary
- ✅ Can be used commercially
- ✅ Can be modified
- ✅ Can be distributed
- ✅ Can be used privately
- ⚠️ **Requirement**: Include license notice with distributions

This README serves as the required license attribution.

## Notes

These are production minified versions. Source maps and full source code are available from the project repositories.
